page_metadata.biotools__summary: Takes one or more protein sequences as input and analyzes them in a five-step process during which searches for sequence homologues, analyses of multiple sequence alignments, and hierarchical relationships between protein subfamilies are performed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Takes one or more protein sequences as input and analyzes them in a five-step process during which searches for sequence homologues, analyses of multiple sequence alignments, and hierarchical relationships between protein subfamilies are performed.
